failure_surface: Output workbook structure and formatting do not match expected result despite correct row count reduction
root_cause: When rebuilding the output workbook from scratch using openpyxl's create_sheet() method, the agent lost the second worksheet ('Desired outcome') and failed to preserve existing cell formatting, styles, and potential formulas from the original RNM sheet.
minimal_fix_hypothesis: Copy entire source workbook first, then modify the target worksheet in-place rather than deleting and recreating it, ensuring auxiliary sheets and formatting are preserved.
evidence: Agent deletes the RNM sheet entirely: del wb_out[source_sheet_name]
Agent creates a new sheet: ws_new = wb_out.create_sheet(title=source_sheet_name)
New sheet loses any existing column widths, row heights, merged cells, styles, or formulas
Verification only checked row/column counts, not sheet count or cell formatting integrity

memory_items.title: Preserve Auxiliary Sheets During Workbook Editing
memory_items.lesson: When editing a specific worksheet, always copy the entire source workbook first before modifications to ensure non-target sheets remain intact.
memory_items.generalization: Never delete and recreate a single sheet without explicitly preserving all other worksheets in the workbook.

memory_items.title: Modify In-Place vs Rebuild from Scratch
memory_items.lesson: For tasks requiring formatting/style preservation, modify existing cells directly rather than clearing the sheet and writing new values.
memory_items.generalization: Use iter_rows() to update cell values in place instead of creating a new worksheet and copying headers/data.

memory_items.title: Comprehensive Validation Beyond Dimensions
memory_items.lesson: Validation must verify not just row/column counts but also sheet existence, cell formatting, and data types after manipulation.
memory_items.generalization: Always check that auxiliary sheets survived modification and that no corruption occurred to non-target content.

edits.content:
**Auxiliary Content Preservation**: When modifying a specific worksheet, never delete sheets unless explicitly required. Always copy the source workbook before making changes to preserve non-target sheets, charts, and hidden content.

**In-Place Modification**: For tasks requiring format retention, modify existing cells directly using iter_rows() rather than clearing and rewriting the entire sheet, which strips styles, column widths, and merged cell structures.

**Multi-Sheet Integrity Check**: After generating output, verify that all original sheets exist in the output file unless deletion was explicitly instructed.
